LanguageData.STF_CommandAttachDesc: Target a colonist. The pawn will walk to the trailer and attach it.
LanguageData.STF_CommandDetachDesc: Try to restore this unit as a building near the towing pawn.
LanguageData.STF_CommandDetachPawnDesc: Detach a towed trailer from this pawn and try to restore it as a nearby building.
LanguageData.STF_CommandEmergencyDetachPawnDesc: Immediately restore this trailer near the towing pawn without choosing a placement.
LanguageData.STF_CommandDeployPawnDesc: Choose a placement. The towing pawn will walk there and restore the trailer as a building.
LanguageData.STF_CommandCaravanRestoreDesc: Best-effort restore manifest items that still exist in spawned colonist inventories.
LanguageData.STF_CommandLoadNearbyDesc: Create a hauling list for this trailer. Colonists assigned to hauling will carry selected items to it.
LanguageData.STF_CommandUnloadContentsDesc: Example plugin command: place the trailer container contents on nearby ground.
LanguageData.STF_NoHandlerDesc: No small trailer handler is registered for key {0}.
LanguageData.STF_MessageNoHoldingPawn: Could not find a pawn holding this unit.
LanguageData.STF_MessageNoBridge: No caravan inventory bridge is available.
LanguageData.STF_MessageNoHandler: No small trailer handler is available.
LanguageData.STF_FailNoPackedDef: This unit has no packed token def configured.
LanguageData.STF_FailPawnCount: Invalid towing pawn count: expected {0} to {1}.
LanguageData.STF_FailModeUnsupported: The example plugin does not support switching to {0}.
LanguageData.STF_FailPackedMissingComp: The packed token is missing the small trailer comp.
LanguageData.STF_FailInventoryRejected: {0} could not carry the trailer token.
LanguageData.STF_FailNoBuildingDef: This unit has no building def configured.
LanguageData.STF_FailBuildingMissingComp: The building def is missing the small trailer comp.
LanguageData.STF_FailPlaceBuilding: Could not place the trailer building nearby.
LanguageData.STF_FailNothingRestored: No manifest item could be restored.
LanguageData.STF_FailMassCapacity: The trailer cannot carry that much mass.
